description.zh-Hans: 双端口灰度转换器。输入端口0「图像」为彩色（或灰度）图像，端口1「灰度遮罩」为灰度遮罩。输出端口0「图像」为中性灰RGB图像（R=G=B=灰度），源自任一可用输入（图像端口优先于遮罩端口）。端口1「灰度遮罩」以遮罩类型端口暴露相同灰度数据。无需模式切换，两种转换同时进行。将遮罩转换为图像（端口0输出）时不会施加颜色着色，结果始终为纯中性灰RGB图像。
description.en: Dual-port grayscale converter. Inputs Port 0 "image" – a color (or grayscale) image Port 1 "grayMask" – a grayscale mask Outputs Port 0 "image" – neutral-gray RGB image (R = G = B = gray) derived from whichever input is available (image port takes priority over mask port). Port 1 "grayMask" – same grayscale data exposed as a Mask-typed port. No mode switch is needed: both conversions happen simultaneously. Converting a mask to an image (port 0 output) never applies color tinting – the result is always a pure neutral-gray RGB image.

triggers.zh-Hans: 灰度, 去色, 黑白, 单色
triggers.en: grayscale, desaturate, black and white, monochrome

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将彩色图像转换为灰度进行进一步处理。
exampleUsage.en: Convert a color image to grayscale for further processing.
